parsed.production_notes: The video consists of a single, continuous shot of an AI-generated avatar. The facial movements, particularly the mouth and blinking, exhibit an uncanny smoothness typical of AI generation, and the lighting and background are perfectly static.

characters.appearance: Young woman with fair skin and brown eyes. She has red hair styled in a loose, low bun with face-framing strands.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, reassuring, and attentive, maintaining constant eye contact.

scenes.setting: Cozy indoor setting, warm lighting, blurred background with a glowing lamp.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with red hair in a loose bun is framed in a close-up shot. She is wearing a beige chunky knit sweater. She holds a light brown ceramic mug with both hands near her chest. The background is a softly blurred, warm-toned interior with a glowing lamp visible on the right. The lighting on her face is soft and flattering. She looks directly at the camera with a friendly expression.

scenes.visual_description: A close-up shot of Character A holding a mug, speaking directly to the viewer. The setting is cozy and warm. Dynamic word-by-word captions appear over her chest.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Most people can read in English, but when a native speaker speaks fast, they don't understand.
Character A says: It's not your fault.
Character A says: Real conversations are fast and full of emotion.
Character A says: That's where I come in.
scenes.on_screen_text: most people can read in English but when a native speaker speaks fast they don't understand it's not your fault real conversations are fast and full of emotion that's where I come in

scenes.setting: Cozy indoor setting, warm lighting, blurred background with a glowing lamp.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with red hair in a loose bun is framed in a close-up shot. She is wearing a beige chunky knit sweater. She holds a light brown ceramic mug with both hands near her chest. The background is a softly blurred, warm-toned interior with a glowing lamp visible on the right. The lighting on her face is soft and flattering. She looks directly at the camera with a friendly expression.

scenes.visual_description: The same continuous close-up shot of Character A holding a mug. She continues her pitch with a reassuring demeanor. Dynamic word-by-word captions continue to appear over her chest.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I'm Loora, your AI English tutor.
Character A says: We'll practice listening and speaking together everyday, just like you would with a real person.
Character A says: I'll help you get used to real speed, correct your pronunciation, and guide you through mistakes gently.
Character A says: No stress, no pressure.
Character A says: Just natural English that gets better everyday.

scenes.setting: Cozy indoor setting, warm lighting, blurred background with a glowing lamp.

She holds a light brown ceramic mug with both hands near her chest. The background is a softly blurred, warm-toned interior with a glowing lamp visible on the right. scenes.visual_description: The final segment of the continuous close-up shot. Character A delivers the concluding promise while maintaining eye contact. Dynamic word-by-word captions are displayed over her chest.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: And in just 3 weeks, you'll start understanding everything people say, and speaking with real confidence.
scenes.on_screen_text: and in just 3 weeks you'll start understanding everything people say and speaking with real confidence
